title: celtis sinensis var. nervosa
intro: Celtis sinensis var. nervosa, also known as the Chinese Cork Tree or Chinese Pear, is a variety of the Celtis sinensis plant, belonging to the elm family and native to China. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Celtis sinensis var. nervosa is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in the production of traditional Chinese medicines, such as patent medicines and herbal extracts.
